channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Get to Know a Mid-Major: Big Sky Conference
item.description: A look at who's who and what they are playing for in the men's and women's college basketball mid-major Big Sky conference.

item.title: MLB Free Agency Rumors, Buzz: Marte 'Happy' With D-Backs Amid Trade Chatter
item.description: Keeping track of players who may be on the move, manager comings and goings, and other buzz from around the majors.

item.title: USA's Baseball, Softball Get Automatic Spots At L.A.'s 2028 Summer Olympics
item.description: The United States will automatically qualify for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympic baseball and softball tournaments

item.title: Inside The Garage: With NASCAR Lawsuit in Rearview, What Does it Mean for Drivers?
item.description: After months of uncertainty regarding their futures, find out how drivers feel with the NASCAR lawsuit behind them.

item.title: Red Sox Acquire Caleb Durbin In Six-Player Trade With Brewers
item.description: Third baseman Caleb Durbin is heading to the Boston Red Sox in a six-player trade with the Milwaukee Brewers.

item.title: Bracketology: Saint Louis could be a real threat come March
item.description: The Billikens are an analytical unicorn -- and shaping up to be the Atlantic 10's next generational team.

item.title: 'Quad God,' U.S. defend figure skating team gold
item.description: Ilia Malinin beat rival Shun Sato, helping the U.S. defend its team figure skating gold medal.

item.title: What this NBA trade deadline revealed: Teams are finding new ways to tank
item.description: Much to the irritation of some league insiders, the trade deadline was more than just a flurry of moves: It showed the next evolution in teams racing ...

item.title: 'A glitch in the matrix': How does Ilia Malinin do what seems impossible?
item.description: At the Winter Olympics, figure skater Ilia Malinin intends to land a quad axel -- as well as a backflip and his own "Raspberry Twist."

item.title: Men's Bubble Watch: Iowa's inch to lock status, more results from a packed weekend
item.description: Iowa, USC pulled out wins but Ohio State, UCF, West Virginia, Tulsa have work to do after a mixed bubble Sunday.
